description.value:
Whether you were born from an explosive supernova or brilliant nebula, your progenitor star remains out there to this day, burning bright as a superdense neutron star or a white dwarf. Like your progenitor, you're incredibly dense, weighing twice as much as a typical novian. You're capable of standing firm against the strongest of external forces and enduring any hardship.

You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Fortitude and Reflex DCs against attempts to [[/act reposition]], [[/act shove]], or [[/act trip]] you. This bonus also applies to saving throws against spells or effects that attempt to force you to move or knock you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Prone]. In addition, if any effect would force you to move 10 feet or more, you're moved only half the distance.
